rows.description: Soluta Varia.
rows.notes: Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Clearly a header.

rows.description: The Tavern Bill for Oct: 5 & Nov: 2
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash amounts (0-1-0) based on visual verification of a dash in the pounds column, as noted by gemini-flash. Overrode gpt-5-mini's incorrect reading of 1-10-0. Description adjusted for visual accuracy (no trailing dash).
rows.english_description: Payment of the tavern bill covering the specified October and November dates.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of the tavern bill covering the specified October and November dates, amounting to £0 1s 0d.

rows.description: Pd for a Set of Philosophical Transactions for ye Library bound to 1724.
rows.notes: Visual verification shows 1 pound, 10 shillings, 0 pence. Both extractors were incorrect on amounts (gemini-flash had 1-12-0, gpt-5-mini had 12-12-0). Description is a merge of gemini-flash's split lines (3 and 4), reflecting the logical entry.
rows.english_description: Purchase of a set of Philosophical Transactions bound for the college library to 1724.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Purchase of a set of Philosophical Transactions bound for the college library to 1724, amounting to £1 10s 0d.

rows.description: Pd Chr Jakes for glazing in part
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Selected gemini-flash's description 'Chr Jakes' as visually more accurate than gpt-5-mini's 'Mr Jakes'.
rows.english_description: Part payment to Christopher Jakes for glazing work.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Part payment to Christopher Jakes for glazing work, amounting to £15 15s 0d.

rows.description: account Dinner —
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for amounts (0-1-2) and description, as it correctly identifies the dash in pounds and includes the trailing dash in the description, verified visually.
rows.english_description: Payment relating to a dinner account.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment relating to a dinner account, amounting to £0 1s 2d.

rows.description: Mile-way Tax at Yardington

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of the mileway tax at Yardington, amounting to £0 3s 2d.

rows.description: Pd for Mr Reynell's Management of an affair, in relation to a new Motion of Dr Newton about Start Hall
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Description is a merge of gemini-flash's split lines (8, 9, 10), corrected to 'Start Hall' based on visual verification, which gemini-flash correctly identified.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Reynell for managing an affair connected with Dr Newton's new motion about Start Hall, amounting to £3 10s 0d.

rows.description: Pd the Glazier in full the Remainder of his Bill
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Description is a merge of gemini-flash's split lines (11 and 12), corrected to 'Glazier' based on visual verification, which gemini-flash correctly identified.

rows.english_description: Additional payment to Mr Collison for timber and related work.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment covering Mr Boyse's land tax, amounting to £0 8s 11d.

rows.description: Pd Mr Richardson for making 3 Doz: and ½ of Napkins

rows.description: Pd Mr Richardson wt remains due to the Jany in the year 1727

rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Richardson of the balance remaining that was due in January 1727.

rows.description: Corn Prices
rows.notes: Overrode gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms 'Corn Prices' is a header with no associated amounts, as correctly identified by gpt-5-mini. gemini-flash incorrectly extracted amounts for this line.

rows.description: Pd Mr Vicars the Mercer his Bill for Velvet for the Chapel, & Napkins for the Bellows Table
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Description is a merge of gemini-flash's split lines (24, 25, 26), which provides a more complete and accurate reading ('Vicars', 'Bellows Table') than gpt-5-mini.

rows.description: Fellows Table
rows.notes: Added this row as it was missed by gemini-flash but correctly identified by gpt-5-mini as a header based on visual verification.

rows.description: Pd the College Smith in part for Iron works on the Back Buildings
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Description is a merge of gemini-flash's split lines (27 and 28), corrected to 'Iron works' based on visual verification, which gemini-flash correctly identified.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Part payment to the college smith for ironwork on the back buildings, amounting to £21 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Description is a merge of gemini-flash's split lines (29 and 30), aligning with visual interpretation for accuracy.

rows.description: Pd Mr Vicars for Silk lining for the Cushions in the Chappell

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for tending or looking after the lamp, amounting to £0 10s 0d.

rows.english_description: Payment to the gardener for work about the quadrangle.

rows.description: Pd the College Smith the Remainder of his Bill for Iron Work on the Back Buildings

rows.english_description_with_amount: Final payment to the college smith of the remainder of his bill for ironwork on the back buildings, amounting to £12 2s 5d.
